content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally with NIFTY +1.23%, Auto +2.32%, IT +1.58% leading. VIX down 5.87% to 16.99 indicates risk-on sentiment. Book is +1.08% on the day with all 8 holdings green or near-flat. Priority is locking in gains via SL trails on the strongest movers — PNBHOUSING, COALINDIA, HINDZINC, SUNPHARMA — rather than chasing new breakouts late in a gap-up day.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24060,
      "nifty_resistance": 24400
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.85,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position at +7.4% with strong Q4 beat (PAT +19% YoY, GNPA <1%) and MOFSL Buy. Current SL at 1033.90 is essentially at breakeven from current 1056.70 (~2.2% buffer). Price near R1 1001 already broken and consolidating above VWAP 1044. Slight tightening to 1035 to lock in ~5% gain while letting it run toward 1110. Risk-reward still favorable."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Down 2% but holding above SL of 119. Acts as defensive hedge. SMA20 at 122.12 is being tested as support today. No change to SL needed — risk-on day temporarily weighs on gold but structural thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1438.00,
      "new_target": 1485.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Currently +2.5%, already at 52w high zone (1456 today). Existing SL at 1438 is essentially at current price (1448) — already locks in ~+1.8% gain. No-op MODIFY would violate guidance. HOLD is correct — but flagging that if it pushes through 1456 we'll trail higher next tick."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Position +0.8%. SL at 402 is just below entry — already protected. Q4 results May 15 is a catalyst we want to hold for. Power cluster (NTPC + POWERGRID + COALINDIA) already sizable; no add. Hold current SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1742.00,
      "new_target": 1810.00,
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Volume 5.3x on Organon acquisition news ($11.75bn) — sentiment mixed (leverage concern, integration risk per research). MACD bearish crossover. Reducing target from 1830 to 1810 (closer to 52w high 1851 minus buffer) to take profits sooner given uncertain post-deal trajectory. SL stays at 1742 (above entry 1734) — already locked. R-R now 53 reward vs 14 risk = 3.8:1 still good."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Position +0.3%, marginal gain. SL at 318 (below entry 320.50) — within 2% acceptable risk. Defensive transmission play with record peak power demand catalyst. Hold for now; will trail once it clears 325 (52w high zone)."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 475.00,
      "new_target": 495.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +3.1% — meets >+2% trail trigger. Current SL 471 is barely above entry. Tightening to 475 locks in ~+1.3% guaranteed. Stock broke 52w high (476) today on Q4 results + Rs 5.25 dividend. Raising target from 488 to 495 to allow trend room. R-R: 12 reward / 7.5 risk on remaining = 1.6:1."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HINDZINC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 608.00,
      "new_target": 660.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 5,
      "reasoning": "Position +1.0%. Dividend record date tomorrow Apr 30 (Rs 11/share = ~1.8% of price) — will go ex-dividend. Tightening SL slightly from 605 to 608 to protect against post-ex-div drawdown. Bearish engulfing on Apr 23 is a concern. Holding through dividend then will reassess."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL up slightly to lock in stronger gains on +7.4% winner."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge; SMA20 support holding."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already at entry+ effectively. Wait for further breakout above 1456 to trail."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL near entry; await Q4 results catalyst May 15."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1742.00,
      "reasoning": "SL unchanged at 1742; reducing target due to deal-related uncertainty."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Marginal gain; SL within acceptable risk."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 475.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail above entry to lock in gain on +3.1% winner at 52w high breakout."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDZINC",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 608.00,
      "reasoning": "Modest tighten ahead of ex-dividend tomorrow."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BHARTIARTL Q4 results today (post-market) — wait for outcome before considering entry; current 1891 already up 4% intraday. CEATLTD — Q4 +145% PAT but stock already faded from 3949 high to 3729 (bearish marubozu pattern); skip the chase. GRSE — up 49% in April, gapped 10.5%, faded from 3339 high to 3151 — too extended for entry. INTELLECT — choppy post-gap; not a clean breakout. ITC and TECHM — patient observation, no clean trigger today. ADANIENT Q4 tomorrow — event risk + QIP dilution overhang argues NO_ACTION.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 50% deployed with 8 positions, all green or flat. Power/Energy cluster (NTPC + POWERGRID + COALINDIA) = ~21% of capital — at the cluster soft cap, NO further additions. Financial Services (PNBHOUSING) is 1 position. Today's job is RISK MANAGEMENT: locking in gains via SL trails on the 3-4% movers. Win rate of 14% over 5 days with profit factor 0.4x is concerning — strong signal to be SELECTIVE on new entries. Late-morning gap-up breakouts on a +1.23% NIFTY day are the WORST entry timing (chasing). Deferring all new BUY decisions today. Existing pending orders (GLENMARK, PHARMABEES, TATAPOWER) — leaving them as-is for now; they're below current market and may fill on a pullback."
}
